sources.title: Current lead for cryogenic apparatus
sources.relevance_sentence: HTS current lead configured to minimize both ohmic heating and conductive heat leak, optimizing the same two quantities CF-7 proposes to jointly qualify.

sources.title: Cryocooler cold head interface receptacle
sources.relevance_sentence: Demountable cryocooler cold-head interface with characterized per-lead heat leak (0.31 W cited), establishing long-standing prior art for heat-leak specification at a cold-head interface.

sources.title: Ceramic superconductor cryogenic current lead
sources.relevance_sentence: Early ceramic HTS current lead patent addressing heat-leak management with cryocooler-style cooling; background/blocking art for heat-leak reduction claim elements.

sources.title: Current lead for cryostat using composite high temperature superconductors
sources.relevance_sentence: Composite HTS current lead with sheath gaps filled with low-thermal-conductivity adhesive specifically to reduce heat leak into the cryostat.

sources.title: Thermally shielded superconductor current lead
sources.relevance_sentence: Low-heat-leak conduction-cooled HTS current lead system operable in persistent-current mode with intermediate thermal-anchor block tied to cryocooler first stage.

sources.title: Shuntable low loss variable current vapor cooled leads for superconductive loads
sources.relevance_sentence: Vapor-cooled lead design explicitly engineered for low heat loss; background art for heat-leak-optimization half of CF-7.

sources.title: Vapor cooled current lead for cryogenic electrical equipment
sources.relevance_sentence: Foundational vapor-cooled current lead patent with measured heat-leak reduction (~40% vs conventional), establishing old priority for measured heat-leak spec on a current lead.

sources.title_original: 高安全性低漏热高温超导大电流引线的分流器
sources.title_translation: A shunt for a high-safety, low-heat-leak HTS large-current lead
sources.relevance_sentence: Shunt for 68kA-class HTS current lead engineered so heat leak to 5K stays below ~0.2 W/kA even after loss of superconductivity, a heat-leak spec built into the component.

sources.title_original: 超電導電流リードの製造方法
sources.title_translation: Method for manufacturing superconducting current leads
sources.relevance_sentence: Manufacturing method connecting HTS conductor to support member via conductive resin; process-adjacent background for current-lead fabrication.

sources.title_translation: Hybrid cooling device for superconducting power equipment
sources.relevance_sentence: Hybrid cooling device (LN2 supply/circulation) for superconducting power equipment; system-level background, indirect relevance (hybrid not pure conduction-cooled).
PCT filing for conduction-cooled superconducting rotating machine with cryocooler; system-level conduction-cooling background, not lead-specific.

Fujikura markets a 12mm non-copper-stabilizer 2G HTS tape variant explicitly for current-lead/low-thermal-conducting applications, showing an assignee-watch company already commercializes the heat-leak-vs-current tradeoff component.

sources.title: Design of a Termination for the HTS Power Cable
sources.relevance_sentence: Establishes 'termination' as an integrated multi-function assembly (current lead + joint + thermal boundary) in HTS cable art, conceptually close to CF-7's lead/termination framing though in the cable rather than magnet-coil domain.

sources.title: Partially-insulated HTS coils
sources.relevance_sentence: Partially-insulated/no-insulation-adjacent HTS coil patent family in the immediate NI-HTS-coil neighborhood this project tracks.

sources.title: Cold Performance Tests of the ITER 68 kA HTS Current Lead Prototypes
sources.relevance_sentence: Single most relevant hit: describes an integrated cold-performance qualification campaign combining joint-resistance testing and heat-conduction (heat-leak) testing on the same current-lead prototype before series production.

sources.title: Mock-up qualification and prototype manufacture for ITER current leads
sources.relevance_sentence: Describes the 2013 mock-up qualification program (7 mock-ups) for ITER HTS current leads validating design/manufacturing process before series production, institutionalizing combined test-item qualification.

sources.title: Optimal Design and Test of the 68 kA HTS Current Lead for ITER at CASIPP
sources.relevance_sentence: Overlapping design+test paper from the CASIPP program corroborating combined thermal-electrical test scope for ITER HTS current leads.

sources.title: Current Leads, Links and Buses
sources.author: A. Ballarino, CERN
sources.relevance_sentence: Authoritative review of current-lead physics giving standard heat-inleak benchmark figures (~47 W/kA at 4.2K for optimized conduction-cooled lead) for G-PHYS cross-reference.

sources.title: Numerical Model for Conduction-Cooled Current Lead Heat Loads
sources.relevance_sentence: Numerical/analytical heat-load model specific to conduction-cooled current leads, directly on-point background for CF-7's heat-leak-modeling methodology.

sources.title: Development of vapor-cooled HTS-copper 6-kA current lead incorporating operation in the current-sharing mode
sources.relevance_sentence: Hybrid vapor-cooled/HTS lead development paper reporting heat-leak reduction data, background art for heat-leak optimization.

sources.title: Thermodynamic optimization of conduction-cooled HTS current leads
sources.relevance_sentence: Early thermodynamic-optimization paper for conduction-cooled HTS leads, foundational background for physics of any CF-7 heat-leak spec derivation.

sources.title: HTS Joint Resistance for High-Field Magnets: Experiment and Temperature-Dependent Modeling
sources.journal: Journal of Superconductivity and Novel Magnetism
sources.relevance_sentence: Combines experimental joint-resistance measurement with temperature-dependent modeling for HTS joints in high-field magnets, directly on-point for the joint/contact resistance half of CF-7's co-qual concept.

sources.title: Study on the electrical performances of soldered joints between HTS coated-conductors
sources.relevance_sentence: Joint-resistance QC testing methodology for REBCO lap joints applied during coil fabrication and incoming-conductor QC, process precedent for joint resistance as manufacturing acceptance criterion.

sources.title: SELFIE: ITER superconducting joint test facility
sources.relevance_sentence: Dedicated joint-resistance QC test facility for production-proof-sample quality control of ITER superconducting joints, showing electrical-only joint QC as an established independent discipline that CF-7 must distinguish from by combining with heat-leak qualification.

sources.title: Fabrication and installation of the Mu2e cryogenic distribution system / Mu2e Technical Design Report splice qualification
sources.relevance_sentence: Describes a GTAW splice-joint qualification protocol (8 splices tested at LHe temp to 10kA), electrical/mechanical qualification precedent for superconducting joints generally.

sources.title: Cryocooler cooled HTS current lead for a 35kJ/7kW-class high-Tc SMES system
sources.relevance_sentence: Cryocooler-cooled (no cryogen bath) HTS current lead for an SMES system, directly on-theme conduction-cooled/no-cryogen background art; recommend closer read for explicit combined test-record language.

sources.title: Optimized design and performance test of 16 kA HTS current leads used for fusion HTS magnets
sources.relevance_sentence: Recent (2025) design+test paper for fusion-relevant HTS current leads; postdates most patent priority dates in this space, recommend close follow-up read as possible current state-of-the-art reference.

sources.title_original: 高温超電導電流リード
sources.relevance_sentence: General technical glossary confirming HTS current-lead / conduction-cooled magnet terminology and standard heat-leak-vs-resistivity problem statement in Japanese technical literature.

sources.title: CryoSaver(TM) Current Leads
sources.relevance_sentence: Commercial HTS current-lead product line marketed on low-heat-leak performance; commercial-embodiment background.

sources.title: Superconducting & Vapor Cooled Current Leads
sources.relevance_sentence: Notes >450 units delivered to CERN, GSI, ENEA, SuperNode, evidence that vapor-cooled/superconducting current leads with established test records are a mature commercial product category.

sources.title: Intelligent current lead device and operational methods thereof
sources.assignee: IBM (per Justia cross-listing, unconfirmed via direct patent text - gap)
sources.relevance_sentence: Intelligent current lead with apparent sensor/monitoring/operational-method framing, potentially relevant if CF-7 embodiments extend to integrated sensing/certification data; flagged for dedicated full-text pull before G-NOVEL relies on it.

sources.title: High Temperature Superconducting Current Lead Assembly for Cryogenic Apparatus
sources.relevance_sentence: Additively-manufactured heat-exchanger + HTS-strip lead assembly for MRI-class cryogenic apparatus reducing cryogen boil-off during ramping; most legally live US reference on the thermal-qual half found this pass.

sources.title: High Temperature Superconducting Current Lead Assembly for Cryogenic Apparatus
sources.relevance_sentence: Continuation of CF7-S2-1; confirms GE actively prosecuting current-lead heat-exchanger manufacturing family as recently as Jan 2026.

sources.title: Efficient thermal joints for connecting current leads to a cryocooler
sources.relevance_sentence: Indium-sheet/ceramic-spacer thermal joint between current lead and cryocooler cold station with quantified thermal conductance (5 W/cm2-K); direct thermal-interface prior art for cryocooler-coupling context.

sources.title: High-temperature superconductor lead
sources.relevance_sentence: Zig-zag/non-collinear HTS plate-lead geometry increasing thermal path length to cut heat leak; thermal-only, no joint-resistance acceptance coupling.

sources.title: High temperature superconductor lead assembly
sources.relevance_sentence: Warm-end (~60K) heat-sinked HTS lead claiming ~6x refrigeration reduction (595 to 100 W/kA per pair) vs bulk leads; quantified thermal performance, no electrical joint-resistance qual record.

sources.title: High-TC superconducting lead assembly in a cryostat dual penetration for refrigerated superconductive magnets
sources.relevance_sentence: Dual-penetration HTS lead assembly balancing minimal heat leak against differential-thermal-contraction stress between 10K/50K stations; flagged for overlap with CF-6 thermal-contraction-matched NI interface, check self-collision at synthesis.

sources.title: Oxide superconductor current lead and method of manufacturing the same, and superconducting system
sources.assignee: Chubu Electric Power Co Inc; Dowa Electronics Materials Co Ltd
sources.relevance_sentence: Closest reference found (either pass) to a documented, quantified electrical joint/contact-resistance acceptance measurement on a current lead (0.28 ohm at 77K, 0.2 ohm at 4.2K at up to 1060A); no combined thermal heat-leak acceptance record in same document.

sources.title: HTS magnet sections
sources.relevance_sentence: Praying-hands low-resistance joint configuration for HTS coil sections in rigid pre-formed copper housings; joint-resistance-focused prior art at coil-interconnect level from an active fusion-adjacent assignee.

sources.title_original: 伝導冷却型超電導磁石システム
sources.relevance_sentence: Varies cryocooler compressor frequency against coil-temperature feedback to conserve cooling headroom; system-level cryocooler-budget management directly adjacent to CF-7's limited-cooling-power framing.

sources.title_original: 一种高温超导电缆结构和高温超导电缆系统
sources.title_translation: A high-temperature superconducting cable structure and system
sources.assignee: Beijing Jiaotong University; State Grid Jiangsu Electric Power Co Ltd; State Grid Corp of China
sources.status: rejected (substantive examination rejection, 2022-08-05) - logged per duty of candor
sources.relevance_sentence: Removes copper stabilizer/wire-bundle framework to reduce fault-current thermal load on cryogenic system; cable-level thermal-recovery-budget angle tangential to CF-7, application was rejected.

sources.title: Structure, design, and test of 13 kA HTS current lead
sources.publication_note: published online 2022-12-21; distinct from CF7-T3-1/T3-3 which cover the 68 kA ITER lead - separate 13 kA lead program
sources.assignee: Institute of Plasma Physics, Chinese Academy of Sciences (ASIPP)
sources.relevance_sentence: Reports a Nov-2020 acceptance-test sequence on one physical unit combining steady-state, LOFA, joint-resistance, pulse-current, and insulation-voltage tests; another strong combined thermal+electrical test-campaign precedent.

sources.title: 50 kA Capacity, Nitrogen-Cooled, Demountable Current Leads for the SPARC Toroidal Field Model Coil
sources.author: Fry, V. et al.
sources.relevance_sentence: Commonwealth Fusion Systems/MIT-affiliated SPARC program demountable current-lead design and test paper; nitrogen-cooled but closely adjacent architecture/test methodology from a directly-watched assignee.

sources.title_translation: Development of a conduction-cooled characteristic-evaluation apparatus for superconducting power equipment
sources.relevance_sentence: Closest Korean-language hit found (either pass) to CF-7's co-verified thermal+electrical record framing: a 2G-HTS-tape current lead built to reduce external heat leak, evaluated on a dedicated conduction-cooled characterization rig; still an R&D apparatus, not a shipped product qualification record.

gaps: No direct authenticated access to PatentsView, CNIPA, J-PlatPat, KIPRIS, Espacenet, or WIPO PatentScope this session; used Google Patents mirrors + Justia/USPTO PDF mirrors + secondary aggregators as proxy.
Assignee/priority date unconfirmed for CF7-T1-2, T1-3, T1-7, T1-8, T1-9, T1-10, T1-11, T2-2, T4-4.
Korean-language yield thin for this specific sub-topic (2 hits pass 1 + 1 report pass 2, still mostly system-level not lead-level) - recommend native KIPRIS re-run.
No direct Espacenet/PatentScope CPC classification browse of H01F6/06 + H01R4/68 performed.
Several Tier 3 items identified via abstract/snippet only, full text not retrieved (paywalled).

arXiv:1209.3007 (Numerical Model for Conduction-Cooled Current Lead Heat Loads) PDF text extraction failed in supplemental pass (binary/compressed stream) - title/relevance not independently re-verified beyond first-pass search snippet; flag before G-NOVEL reliance.

No Hinetics-assigned patent found specifically on current-lead/termination (only coil-architecture patent US20220302816A1 surfaced); open watch item for refresh pass as Hinetics' post-CES-2026 filings mature.
